amendatorysection.para: For purposes of the New Taxpayer Recruitment Grant Act:
(1) Department means the Department of Economic Development;
(2) Household means one or more individuals who dwell together; and

(3) Household goal means the total number of households that a new taxpayer recruitment program seeks to successfully incentivize to relocate or commit to relocate from a location that is outside of this state to a municipality in this state.
